creator: jshupe@osre.org
text:
I would like to have the number changed to our toll-free number at http://www.freebsd.org/commercial/consult.html#osre.

The number 1.866.235.1288 should replace the number 1.903.704.4310.

Also, could you please change the wording from "call us under" to "call us toll-free at"?

Thanks,
James Shupe
